title: Inventory data sources for public-health/oral-health-access-global
outcome: A dated source inventory separating usable, limited, and rejected data sources for oral health service access and dental workforce gaps in low-income countries.
validation_method: Reviewer checks each source for URL, methodology, grain, and limitations.
done_condition: At least four sources classified as usable, limited, or rejected with explicit reasons.

title: Measure sub-national gap for oral health service access and dental workforce gaps in low-income countries
outcome: A sub-national gap analysis with methodology documentation and uncertainty bounds.
validation_method: Replicator reruns analysis with alternative data subsets and confirms results within reported uncertainty.
done_condition: Gap analysis with methodology, uncertainty bounds, and replication.

title: Produce sub-national risk map for oral health service access and dental workforce gaps in low-income countries
outcome: A sub-national gap map with explicit methodology and non-claim caveats.
validation_method: Replicator confirms methodology and validates spatial patterns.
done_condition: Gap map with methodology, caveats, and replication.

title: Red-team misuse risks
outcome: A failure-mode review identifying misuse, overstatement, and harm risks.
validation_method: Mitigations confirmed or publication blocked, then replicated.
done_condition: Every claim qualified or gated behind replication.

title: Check whether outputs match decision needs
outcome: A field-facing review of whether outputs change real decisions responsibly.
validation_method: Field reviewer identifies decision, user, timing, misuse risk, then replicated.
done_condition: Named user, named decision, non-use cases, replicated review.
